reviews.comment: The atmosphere is genuinely charming and relaxing, with soft lighting and comfortable seating perfect for reading or catching up with a friend. I tried their Caramel Macchiato and a slice of their homemade Lemon Drizzle Cake, and both were exceptional—rich, flavorful, and clearly made with care. The service was prompt and the staff were incredibly friendly. It's the perfect little spot for a high-quality coffee and a moment of peace. Highly recommended

reviewReply.comment: We’re delighted to hear you enjoyed the relaxing atmosphere, the Caramel Macchiato, and Cake. It’s great to know the service and overall experience gave you that perfect moment of peace. We truly appreciate the recommendation and look forward to welcoming you again soon.

reviews.comment: Came in hoping for hot chocolate, which I had tried before and loved. While it wasn’t available at the moment, the team warmly guided me to a pistachio coffee since I wanted a lighter coffee option. They customised it perfectly to my preference and even surprised me with a complimentary chocolate pastry. Their thoughtfulness truly shows how well they care for their customers ☕🤍

reviewReply.comment: We’re glad our team could guide you to something you enjoyed and personalise it just the way you like. It’s wonderful to hear the little gesture made your visit special. We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) “Very nice cafe ☕✨
The atmosphere is quite calm and stylish. Both the food and coffee were fresh and tasty. The staff is friendly and polite. The perfect place to spend time with friends or family. I will definitely come back 👍”

(Original)
“Bahut hi achha café hai ☕✨
Yahan ka atmosphere kaafi calm aur stylish hai. Food aur coffee dono hi fresh aur tasty the. Staff bhi friendly aur polite hai. Friends ya family ke saath time spend karne ke liye perfect place. Definitely dobara aana chahunga 👍”

reviewReply.comment:
